hooks.command: mkdir -p .github/hooks && { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] EVENT: UserPromptSubmit"; jq -r '.session_id // "Session ID: unknown"' 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; } >> .github/hooks/agent_log.txt

mkdir -p .github/hooks && { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] EVENT: PreToolUse"; jq -r '"TOOL: " + (.tool_name // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null; jq -r '.tool_input | if . then "INPUT:" else empty end' 2>/dev/null; jq -r '.tool_input | to_entries[] | "  " + .key + ": " + (.value | if type == "string" then (if length > 100 then .[0:100] + "..." else . end) else tojson end)' 2>/dev/null | head -15; echo "STATUS: Started"; echo "---"; } >> .github/hooks/agent_log.txt

mkdir -p .github/hooks && { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] EVENT: PostToolUse (Success)"; jq -r '"TOOL: " + (.tool_name // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null; echo "RESULT:"; jq -r '.tool_response | if . then (if type == "string" then (if length > 150 then .[0:150] + "..." else . end) else . end) else "No response" end' 2>/dev/null; echo "STATUS: Completed"; echo "---"; } >> .github/hooks/agent_log.txt

mkdir -p .github/hooks && { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] EVENT: PostToolUse (FAILED)"; jq -r '"TOOL: " + (.tool_name // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null; echo "ERROR:"; jq -r '.tool_response // "Unknown error"' 2>/dev/null; echo "STATUS: Failed"; echo "---"; } >> .github/hooks/agent_log.txt
